LanguageData.TITAN_No7_Horn.label: No.7 Acid Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No7_Horn.description: No.7's venomous horn. Toxin seeps from the blade; a scratch means continuous corrosion.
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_Horn.label: No.13 Abyss Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No13_Horn.description: No.13's sharp horn. Longer pierce design than original, rapid stab attacks.
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_Horn.label: No.26 Guardian Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No26_Horn.description: No.26's small horn. A weakened version, but carries pure devotion.
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_Horn.label: No.42 Aurora Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No42_Horn.description: No.42's aurora horn. Comes with a cleaving attack; one of the highest-value horns.
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_Horn.label: No.45 Furnace Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No45_Horn.description: No.45's fire-resistant horn. Wielder gains extreme fire resistance.
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_Horn.label: No.50 Wasteland Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No50_Horn.description: No.50's standard horn. Tough and durable, as stubborn as its owner.
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_Dome.label: No.64 Bastion Dome
LanguageData.TITAN_No64_Dome.description: No.64's thick bone dome. Extremely heavy but provides top-tier protection.
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_Horn.label: No.88 Bloom Horn
LanguageData.TITAN_No88_Horn.description: No.88's horn. Surface covered in living symbiotic fungal rootlets.
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_CrimsonHeart.label: Crimson Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_CrimsonHeart.description: A crimson formula manufactured using Warlord's genes. [Usage]: Select "Administer Crimson Mutagen" in the thrumbo's Health -> Operations menu. Effect: No pain sensation, greatly enhanced melee damage.
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VoidMembrane.label: Void Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VoidMembrane.description: A deep-blue formula manufactured using Void Walker's genes. [Usage]: Select "Administer Void Mutagen" in the thrumbo's Health -> Operations menu. Effect: High armor, high dodge chance.
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VerdantSpine.label: Verdant Mutagen
LanguageData.TITAN_Implant_VerdantSpine.description: A verdant-green formula manufactured using Matriarch's genes. [Usage]: Select "Administer Verdant Mutagen" in the thrumbo's Health -> Operations menu. Effect: Extremely high carrying capacity, rapid regeneration.
LanguageData.TITAN_Techprint_Warlord.label: Crimson Horn Plate (Data Core)
LanguageData.TITAN_Techprint_VoidWalker.label: Void Dust (Phase Data)
LanguageData.TITAN_Techprint_VoidWalker.description: Contains Void Walker's phase-shift research data.
LanguageData.TITAN_Techprint_Matriarch.label: Living Resin (Biological Sample)
